title: Ontology sources manifest
description: Declares the artifact roots the search stack loads. Each source points at a directory of {domain}/{domain}.{owl,shacl}.ttl (+ optional *.context.jsonld) subdirectories. Multiple roots are supported; per-root domain allowlists scope large roots.

name.description: Human-readable source name; sources that also declare `data` are promoted to searchable asset domains under this name.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to an artifacts directory containing domain subdirectories.

data.description: Optional workspace-relative path to instance data (JSON-LD/Turtle). When any source declares data, built-in sample data is not loaded.

domains.description: Optional allowlist of domain subdirectory names to load from this root; all others are ignored.
